title: The Land of Oz, a Sequel to the 'Wizard of Oz'
actors: Maryeruth Boone, Zoë Boyer, Matt Flynn
plot: General Jinjur approaches Mombi for aid in conquering the Scarecrow king of the Emerald City. Meanwhile, the Soldier with the Green Whiskers does cartwheels prior to the annunciation of the return of Dorothy. Several dances later,...
